$description: Semantic color tokens that swap between light (dag i Bokskogen) and dark (natt i Bokskogen) themes. Names mirror the --color-* CSS variables in src/assets/css/global/base/variables.css. Light is anchored on warm cream surfaces with charcoal text; dark mirrors the footer in _resources/mok_full_page_layout.html — charcoal background, pale-green text, forest-muted labels, light-MOK-blue links, deep-forest dividers. Values reference palette tokens from colors.json via {curly.brackets} so any palette change cascades automatically. Pushed to Penpot's theme/light and theme/dark sets by build-penpot-tokens.js.
